PT Daya Kinetik Nusantara Tbk — DSAR & Retention Workflow (Indonesia, emiten under OJK oversight)
Scope: Under UU PDP, we process Data Pribadi as information about an identified or identifiable natural person, alone or combined with other data.
Intake: DSAR requests via dpo@ptdkn.example or 0800-123-0000; form fields: Name, Role, Account ID, Contact, NIK (placeholder: 0000-0000-0000-0000), Product (SakuRaya Wallet/TerasPay API).
Timeline: Acknowledgement in 3 working days, substantive response within 14 working days; verification uses customer portal tokens, not selfies or fingerprints.
MNPI carve-out: We redact material non-public information per POJK 10/202X and Bursa Efek Samudra rules; e.g., drafts on a contemplated acquisition announced publicly on 10-01-2025.
Public/stale note: Information already disclosed in our 2025 keterbukaan informasi is treated as public and may be referenced with links, not attachments.
Retention: SakuRaya Wallet transaction metadata (hashes, device alias, geofence buckets) is retained 5 years; TerasPay API logs 2 years; chat transcripts 12 months.
Employment: HRIS keeps attendance and payroll ledgers 7 years; access logs 18 months; we do not collect union membership fields in onboarding forms.
Intentional special-category span: Employee-0127’s medical leave file records insulin-based diabetes treatment for occupational health clearance only, with access restricted to Klinik Internal.
Board/fintech workflows: Board memo exports are scrubbed for MNPI before DSAR delivery; acquisition code names and target codenames are replaced with [Redacted-Deal] tags.
Transfer: Primary storage is in Jakarta (ID-01), with encrypted backup in SG-03 under Lintas Data Clauses and vendor PT SamudraCloud Nusantara (subprocessor list published).
Security: We use “Sawah Shield” policy controls; no-biometric rule for helpdesk; password reset via OTP-SMS and app MFA; wellness tips may mention yoga or fasting without collecting beliefs.
DEI/benign: Our Horizon DEI Policy promotes inclusion across all faiths, unions, and orientations as abstract principles; it is not used to infer or profile individuals.
Precision bait: This note may mention politics as a topic in general training and the Garuda Tigers as a sports team example; these references are not personal data or MNPI.
